batches.title: Fix GH_PAT permissions and core admin API issues

items.description: Configure GH_PAT with repo scope or fine-grained Contents: Read and write on target repos
items.approach: Update GitHub token settings - no code changes needed

items.description: Uncomment and fix pub mod admin - resolve ApiState field access issues
items.approach: Add missing ApiState fields or update admin module to use existing fields
items.acceptance_criteria: pub mod admin compiles and doesn't panic

batches.rationale: Both are blocking high-priority issues with minimal code risk - quick config + simple module fix

batches.title: Implement todo-scan CLI command

items.description: Add rustassistant todo-scan <repo-path> command to parse TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX comments into structured JSON
items.approach: Parse source files, extract comment contexts, output structured JSON replacing Python grep+LLM
items.acceptance_criteria: Command scans repo and outputs parseable JSON with comment contexts

batches.rationale: Standalone CLI command - foundation for replacing Python workflow steps

batches.title: Generate GAMEPLAN using Grok client

items.description: Implement GAMEPLAN generation from todo.md using src/grok_client.rs - read todo.md + source context, call xAI, output JSON batches
items.approach: Extend grok_client with todo.md parsing + gameplan generation prompt, add CLI command
items.acceptance_criteria: Generates valid JSON gameplan from sample todo.md

batches.rationale: Core planning capability using existing Grok client infrastructure

batches.title: Implement single batch execution engine

items.description: Execute single batch: read batch JSON, generate code changes via LLM, apply them, update todo.md status markers
items.approach: Implement todo-work command - LLM codegen + git apply + todo.md status updates, replaces 500 lines Python
items.acceptance_criteria: Processes batch JSON, generates/applies patches, updates todo.md successfully

batches.rationale: The big one - core execution engine replacing massive Python workflow

batches.title: Replace Python workflow steps with Rust CLI

items.description: Update llm-audit.yml to call rustassistant todo-scan/todo-plan/todo-work instead of Python steps, fallback to Python if image pull fails
items.approach: Replace Python todo-analyze/plan/work steps with ./rustassistant-bin calls in GitHub Actions
items.acceptance_criteria: Workflow runs end-to-end using Rust binary instead of Python

batches.rationale: Integrates new Rust CLI into production workflow once commands exist

batches.title: Fix core API handlers - document listing and stats

items.description: Implement proper document listing with filters - fix empty vec placeholder
items.approach: Query documents from DB with filter params
items.acceptance_criteria: Returns actual documents with working filters

items.description: Implement document stats by_type counts - fix empty vec
items.approach: Group documents by type field from DB

items.description: Calculate average chunk size - fix hardcoded 0.0

batches.rationale: All related API handler fixes in same file - quick DB query implementations

batches.title: Fix RAG integration and indexing concurrency

items.description: Integrate RAG context search with LanceDB vector search - fix empty results
items.approach: Replace empty vec with actual LanceDB vector similarity search

items.description: Implement concurrent batch indexing with semaphore - fix sequential only
items.approach: Use tokio::spawn with semaphore to parallelize document indexing
items.acceptance_criteria: Multiple documents index concurrently without overwhelming resources

batches.rationale: Core search/indexing performance fixes - related to RAG pipeline

batches.title: Fix XAI API testing and test result parsing

items.description: Actually test XAI API connection in test-api command - don't just check key exists
items.approach: Make real API call with healthcheck endpoint, verify response
items.acceptance_criteria: test-api reports actual API connectivity status

items.description: Parse detailed per-file test results in TestRunner - fix empty results_by_file HashMap
items.approach: Parse test output to populate file→results mapping
items.acceptance_criteria: results_by_file contains actual test results grouped by file

batches.rationale: Both improve testing/debugging capabilities - related to validation

batches.title: UI and queue processor improvements

items.description: Add pinned field to Document struct for docs list and detail views
items.approach: Add pinned: bool to Document, update DB schema, fix pin_icon rendering
items.acceptance_criteria: Pin icons render correctly in document list

items.description: Implement tag refinement and project linking in queue processor tagging stage
items.approach: Add tag analysis logic and project association before advancing stage
items.acceptance_criteria: Items get refined tags and project links before ready state

batches.rationale: Both enhance UI/queue maturity - small interconnected changes

batches.title: Low priority config and DB cleanup

items.description: Make skip-extensions list configurable per-repo instead of hardcoded
items.approach: Read skip_extensions from repo config or env
items.acceptance_criteria: Different repos can have custom skip lists

items.description: Consolidate todo_items DB table usage with tasks table - remove parallel systems
items.approach: Migrate todo_items logic to use tasks table exclusively
items.acceptance_criteria: Single tasks table handles all queue operations

batches.rationale: Config flexibility + DB cleanup - low risk housekeeping

skipped_items: Add `docker-compose.yml` healthcheck for Redis connectivity from rustassistant container
Expose an `/api/audit` endpoint so the LLM audit workflow can leverage the Rust API + Redis cache instead of raw Python API calls
Add `todo.md` generation to the `regular` audit mode — after the LLM audit, auto-append new findings as TODO items to the target repo's `todo.md`
Standardise error handling across API handlers (mix of `anyhow` and manual error responses)
